a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan:
Carbon intensity measures the kilograms of CO₂ emitted per unit of GDP.
Consumption-based emissions

include those from
fossil fuels and industry
. Land-use change emissions are not included.
Data source: Global Carbon Budget (2024); Bolt and van Zanden - Maddison Project Database 2023
